description: Grey bashful bunny plush — cleaning and refresh, restuffing, and sewing and fabric repair.
itemDetails:
This grey bashful bunny is a soft plush rabbit in the contemporary nursery/gift style that has been widely sold since the 2000s. The "bashful" naming convention is common across boutique plush ranges and usually indicates a floppy, long-limbed rabbit designed for cuddling and display.

Construction is generally polyester plush fabric with polyester fiber fill and safety-stitched facial details. Market value is usually in the everyday gift-plush range, with stronger prices only when a recognized brand tag, original swing tag, and clean condition are present.
